name: How do I challenge an AEO designation?
description: **Letter demand + motion citing improper use.** Courts penalize overuse.[1]

mainEntity.name: How do I challenge an AEO designation?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Letter demand + motion citing improper use.** Courts penalize overuse.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Challenge AEO by letter then motion to de-designate.** Courts require showing designation is improper or overbroad.[1] Key factors: Prove content doesn't warrant restriction. Cite 'sparing use' rules. Include testimony/docs analysis. Risk sanctions if frivolous. Serve on opponent; request in camera review. Hire discovery-savvy lawyer.
